source_note: Public image pricing snapshot. Provider billing exports remain the source of truth.

wan22_endframe.source_detail: Floyo FloTime workflow. Spend is billed in FloTime hours and is not estimated locally; use provider billing for exact charges.

gemini-2.5-flash-image.source_detail: Google lists Gemini 2.5 Flash Image output at $0.039/image standard, $0.0195/image batch/flex, and $0.0702/image priority.

gemini-3-pro-image-preview.source_detail: Google lists Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview output at $0.134 per 1K/2K image and $0.24 per 4K image.

gpt-image-2.source_detail: OpenAI lists GPT Image 2 token prices. Rafiki only estimates this model when token usage is present in a manifest.

gpt-image-1.source_detail: Legacy OpenAI image model. Use manifest amounts or provider billing exports for exact spend.

dall-e-3.source_detail: Legacy OpenAI image model. Use manifest amounts or provider billing exports for exact spend.

dall-e-2.source_detail: Legacy OpenAI image model. Use manifest amounts or provider billing exports for exact spend.
